backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for an inventory management system, defining types for users, inventory items, and adjustment logs, with role-based access control, user approval workflows, and CRUD operations for inventory.
feature_evidence.json: A feature evidence report mapping implemented features (CSS theming, dark mode toggle, Internet Identity auth, RBAC, inventory management, etc.) to their source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry file defining CSS custom property tokens for light and dark mode (backgrounds, foregrounds, borders, chart colors, sidebar) using oklch values.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, setting the page title to 'DCS Tech Inventory Management' and mounting the app via /src/main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application file that sets up TanStack Router with protected and public routes, handles Internet Identity authentication, user profile loading, role-based route gating, and profile setup modal.
frontend/src/components/AddItemModal.tsx: A dialog modal component for adding a new inventory item, with a scrollable form containing fields for name, SKU, category, quantity, price, supplier, and other attributes.
frontend/src/components/InventoryItemDet: A dialog modal component that displays detailed information for a single inventory item, shows its adjustment log history, and allows staff/admin users to add or remove stock quantities.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app layout component with a responsive sidebar navigation, user avatar dropdown, theme toggle, and sign-out functionality; filters nav items based on admin role.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that prompts new users to enter their name and email to create a profile on first login.
frontend/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx: Button component that toggles between light and dark themes using the useTheme hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for backend interactions including user profile CRUD, inventory item management, and adjustment log retrieval.
frontend/src/hooks/useTheme.ts: Thin wrapper around next-themes' useTheme that exposes a toggle function and isDark boolean.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind base layers, OKLCH CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, typography, and custom scrollbar styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: App entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin-only page for managing users (view, approve, reject, delete, change roles) and seeding demo data, with role/status badge components and confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying summary stat cards (total items, low stock, users, activity) and a recent adjustment log feed, with navigation to inventory filtered views.
frontend/src/pages/Inventory.tsx: Inventory list page with search, stock-level filtering, a sortable table of items, and modals for viewing item details and adding new items (admin only).
frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx: Login page that authenticates users via Internet Identity, redirects to the dashboard on success, and displays feature highlights and a theme toggle.
frontend/src/pages/Reports.tsx: Reports page (staff/admin only) showing a filterable, date-range-searchable table of inventory adjustment logs sorted by most recent.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes. Supports sessionStorage-backed persistence so parameters like admin tokens survive navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens, typography, container queries, and animation plugins. Defines design tokens for borders, shadows, sidebar, charts, and semantic colors (success, warning, info).
project_state.json: Project state snapshot describing the DCS Tech Inventory Management app built on Internet Computer with Motoko backend and React/TypeScript frontend. Tracks architectural notes, known issues, existing features, and image requirements for build planning.
